note: Live auth task. The pre_exec populator creates or refreshes a private GitHub fixture repository and regenerates a supervisor snapshot/ground truth from the actual API-visible activity. In live mode the snapshot file is named *_snapshot.json so the runner does not copy it into the executor container.

entries.description: Supervisor/offline fallback snapshot regenerated by ops/populate.py from the fixture plan or live GitHub API; excluded from executor sources when SNAPSHOT_MODE is empty.
